signatures.label: signal<T>(initialValue: T, options?: CreateSignalOptions<T>): WritableSignal<T>
signatures.documentation: Creates a writable signal with an initial value. Signals are reactive primitives that notify consumers when their value changes.

parameters.label: initialValue
parameters.documentation: The initial value of the signal

parameters.label: options
parameters.documentation: Optional configuration including an equality function for change detection

signatures.label: computed<T>(computation: () => T, options?: CreateComputedOptions<T>): Signal<T>
signatures.documentation: Creates a computed signal that derives its value from other signals. The computation is memoized and only re-evaluated when dependencies change.

parameters.label: computation
parameters.documentation: A function that computes the derived value from other signals

parameters.label: options
parameters.documentation: Optional configuration including an equality function

signatures.label: effect(effectFn: (onCleanup: EffectCleanupRegisterFn) => void, options?: CreateEffectOptions): EffectRef
signatures.documentation: Creates a reactive side effect that runs when its signal dependencies change. Effects are scheduled to execute asynchronously.

parameters.label: effectFn
parameters.documentation: A function to execute reactively, receives an onCleanup callback for registering cleanup logic

parameters.label: options
parameters.documentation: Optional effect configuration including injector and manual cleanup settings

signatures.label: input<T>(initialValue?: T, options?: InputOptions<T>): InputSignal<T>
signatures.documentation: Declares a signal-based component input. Replaces the @Input() decorator with a reactive signal-based alternative.

parameters.label: initialValue
parameters.documentation: Optional default value for the input. If omitted, the input is required

parameters.label: options
parameters.documentation: Optional configuration including alias and transform function

signatures.label: output<T>(options?: OutputOptions): OutputEmitterRef<T>
signatures.documentation: Declares a signal-based component output. Replaces the @Output() decorator with a declarative alternative.

parameters.label: options
parameters.documentation: Optional configuration including an alias for the output name

signatures.label: inject<T>(token: ProviderToken<T>, options?: InjectOptions): T
signatures.documentation: Injects a dependency from the Angular dependency injection system. Can be used in constructors, field initializers, and factory functions.

parameters.label: token
parameters.documentation: The DI token (class, InjectionToken, or AbstractType) to inject

parameters.label: options
parameters.documentation: Optional injection flags: optional, self, skipSelf, host

signatures.label: @Component({ selector, template, templateUrl, styles, styleUrls, standalone, imports, providers, changeDetection, encapsulation, animations, host })
signatures.documentation: Decorator that marks a class as an Angular component and provides configuration metadata for template rendering, styling, and dependency injection.

parameters.label: selector
parameters.documentation: CSS selector that identifies the component in templates

parameters.label: template
parameters.documentation: Inline template string for the component

parameters.label: templateUrl
parameters.documentation: URL to an external template file

parameters.label: styles
parameters.documentation: Array of inline CSS style strings

parameters.label: styleUrls
parameters.documentation: Array of URLs to external stylesheet files

parameters.label: standalone
parameters.documentation: Whether the component is standalone (default true in Angular 19+)

parameters.label: imports
parameters.documentation: Array of dependencies to import for standalone components

parameters.label: providers
parameters.documentation: Array of dependency injection providers scoped to this component

parameters.label: changeDetection
parameters.documentation: Change detection strategy: Default or OnPush

signatures.label: @NgModule({ declarations, imports, exports, providers, bootstrap })
signatures.documentation: Decorator that marks a class as an Angular NgModule and provides configuration metadata for the compilation and dependency injection context.

parameters.label: declarations
parameters.documentation: Array of components, directives, and pipes belonging to this module

parameters.label: imports
parameters.documentation: Array of modules whose exported classes are needed by this module

parameters.label: exports
parameters.documentation: Array of declarations to make available to importing modules

parameters.label: providers
parameters.documentation: Array of dependency injection providers

parameters.label: bootstrap
parameters.documentation: Array of root components to bootstrap when this module is loaded

signatures.label: Router.navigate(commands: any[], extras?: NavigationExtras): Promise<boolean>
signatures.documentation: Navigates to a new URL based on an array of route commands. Returns a promise that resolves to true on success.

parameters.label: commands
parameters.documentation: Array of route path segments and parameters for navigation

parameters.label: extras
parameters.documentation: Optional navigation settings: queryParams, fragment, relativeTo, skipLocationChange, replaceUrl

signatures.label: new FormControl<T>(value?: T, validatorOrOpts?: ValidatorFn | ValidatorFn[] | FormControlOptions, asyncValidator?: AsyncValidatorFn | AsyncValidatorFn[]): FormControl<T>
signatures.documentation: Creates a new FormControl instance for reactive forms, tracking value and validation state of an individual form input.

parameters.label: value
parameters.documentation: The initial value of the control

parameters.label: validatorOrOpts
parameters.documentation: Synchronous validators or a configuration object with validators and updateOn strategy

parameters.label: asyncValidator
parameters.documentation: Async validator or array of async validators

signatures.label: new FormGroup<T>(controls: T, validatorOrOpts?: ValidatorFn | ValidatorFn[] | AbstractControlOptions, asyncValidator?: AsyncValidatorFn | AsyncValidatorFn[]): FormGroup<T>
signatures.documentation: Creates a new FormGroup instance that groups multiple form controls, tracking their aggregate value and validation state.

parameters.label: controls
parameters.documentation: A map of child controls with their keys used as control names

parameters.label: validatorOrOpts
parameters.documentation: Synchronous validators or a configuration object

parameters.label: asyncValidator
parameters.documentation: Async validator or array of async validators

signatures.label: FormBuilder.group(controls: { [key: string]: any }, options?: AbstractControlOptions): FormGroup
signatures.documentation: Constructs a FormGroup from a configuration object, reducing boilerplate for reactive form creation.

parameters.label: controls
parameters.documentation: A map of control names to their values, validators, or FormControl configurations

parameters.label: options
parameters.documentation: Optional group-level validators and updateOn strategy

signatures.label: HttpClient.get<T>(url: string, options?: HttpOptions): Observable<T>
signatures.documentation: Sends an HTTP GET request to the specified URL and returns an Observable of the typed response body.

parameters.label: url
parameters.documentation: The endpoint URL for the GET request

parameters.label: options
parameters.documentation: Optional HTTP settings: headers, params, responseType, observe, withCredentials, context, transferCache

signatures.label: HttpClient.post<T>(url: string, body: any, options?: HttpOptions): Observable<T>
signatures.documentation: Sends an HTTP POST request with a request body to the specified URL.

parameters.label: url
parameters.documentation: The endpoint URL for the POST request

parameters.label: body
parameters.documentation: The request payload to send

parameters.label: options
parameters.documentation: Optional HTTP settings: headers, params, responseType, observe, withCredentials

signatures.label: HttpClient.put<T>(url: string, body: any, options?: HttpOptions): Observable<T>
signatures.documentation: Sends an HTTP PUT request with a request body to the specified URL.

parameters.label: url
parameters.documentation: The endpoint URL for the PUT request

parameters.label: body
parameters.documentation: The request payload to send

parameters.label: options
parameters.documentation: Optional HTTP settings: headers, params, responseType, observe, withCredentials

signatures.label: HttpClient.delete<T>(url: string, options?: HttpOptions): Observable<T>
signatures.documentation: Sends an HTTP DELETE request to the specified URL.

parameters.label: url
parameters.documentation: The endpoint URL for the DELETE request

parameters.label: options
parameters.documentation: Optional HTTP settings: headers, params, responseType, observe, withCredentials, body

signatures.label: Validators.compose(validators: ValidatorFn[]): ValidatorFn | null
signatures.documentation: Composes multiple synchronous validators into a single validator function that returns the union of all error maps.

parameters.label: validators
parameters.documentation: Array of validator functions to compose

signatures.label: TestBed.configureTestingModule(moduleDef: TestModuleMetadata): TestBed
signatures.documentation: Configures the testing module with declarations, imports, providers, and schemas for Angular unit tests.

parameters.label: moduleDef
parameters.documentation: Module metadata: declarations, imports, providers, schemas, teardown, errorOnUnknownElements, errorOnUnknownProperties

signatures.label: provideRouter(routes: Routes, ...features: RouterFeatures[]): EnvironmentProviders
signatures.documentation: Provides the Angular Router configuration as environment providers for standalone application bootstrapping.

parameters.label: routes
parameters.documentation: The array of route definitions for the application

parameters.label: features
parameters.documentation: Optional router features: withComponentInputBinding, withHashLocation, withPreloading, withDebugTracing

signatures.label: withComponentInputBinding(): RouterFeature<RouterFeatureKind.ComponentInputBindingFeature>
signatures.documentation: Enables binding route parameters (path params, query params, data) directly to routed component inputs.

signatures.label: EventEmitter.emit(value?: T): void
signatures.documentation: Emits a value to all subscribers of this event emitter. Used with @Output() properties to send data from child to parent components.

parameters.label: value
parameters.documentation: The value to emit to parent component event handlers
